name: Parm Plus Zesty Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Parm Plus seasoning and bread crumbs together.
2. Dip each chicken breast half in the melted butter, ensuring it is well coated.
3. Coat the chicken with the Parm Plus mixture.
4. Place the chicken breasts in a greased 15x10x1 inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until cooked through.
6. Makes 6 servings.
